## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content strategy, hiring challenges, and performance tracking for Zuplo's blog and API directory.](https://fathom.video/share/szEzDmsf8HPY8L3rnjgRRM5_UpDLXDPS?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Fake candidates using AI filters in hiring processes are becoming a concern for remote companies](https://fathom.video/share/szEzDmsf8HPY8L3rnjgRRM5_UpDLXDPS?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
  - [Plans to develop a structured API directory/index to improve site authority and user experience](https://fathom.video/share/szEzDmsf8HPY8L3rnjgRRM5_UpDLXDPS?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
  - [Content performance tracking will be enhanced using Looker Studio and monitoring LLM traffic](https://fathom.video/share/szEzDmsf8HPY8L3rnjgRRM5_UpDLXDPS?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)
  - [Spreading out content publication throughout the week may improve indexing rates](https://fathom.video/share/szEzDmsf8HPY8L3rnjgRRM5_UpDLXDPS?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)

## Topics

### Hiring Challenges

  - [Remote companies facing issues with fake candidates using AI filters during interviews](https://fathom.video/share/szEzDmsf8HPY8L3rnjgRRM5_UpDLXDPS?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
  - [Scammers target remote positions, attempting to secure multiple jobs simultaneously](https://fathom.video/share/szEzDmsf8HPY8L3rnjgRRM5_UpDLXDPS?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [Similar issues observed in content mill spaces with writers outsourcing work](https://fathom.video/share/szEzDmsf8HPY8L3rnjgRRM5_UpDLXDPS?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)

### API Directory Development

  - [Plans to create a dedicated API index or directory section on the website](https://fathom.video/share/szEzDmsf8HPY8L3rnjgRRM5_UpDLXDPS?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
  - [Goal to emulate successful examples like RapidAPI's directory](https://fathom.video/share/szEzDmsf8HPY8L3rnjgRRM5_UpDLXDPS?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
  - [Focus on structuring content around use cases and problem-solving rather than just API definitions](https://fathom.video/share/szEzDmsf8HPY8L3rnjgRRM5_UpDLXDPS?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
  - [Potential to include API scoring and documentation features to drive engagement](https://fathom.video/share/szEzDmsf8HPY8L3rnjgRRM5_UpDLXDPS?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)

### Content Strategy and Performance

  - [Current content batch showing good performance, with some indexing delays](https://fathom.video/share/szEzDmsf8HPY8L3rnjgRRM5_UpDLXDPS?tab=summary&timestamp=1129.0)
  - [Spreading content publication throughout the week may improve indexing rates](https://fathom.video/share/szEzDmsf8HPY8L3rnjgRRM5_UpDLXDPS?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
  - [Exploring ways to differentiate traffic driven by different content types (e.g., programmatic vs. manual)](https://fathom.video/share/szEzDmsf8HPY8L3rnjgRRM5_UpDLXDPS?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)
  - [Implementing Looker Studio for more comprehensive performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/szEzDmsf8HPY8L3rnjgRRM5_UpDLXDPS?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)

### LLM and Alternative Search Engine Traffic

  - [Observed 106 visits from Gemini, Perplexity, and ChatGPT last week (43% increase)](https://fathom.video/share/szEzDmsf8HPY8L3rnjgRRM5_UpDLXDPS?tab=summary&timestamp=1654.0)
  - [LLM traffic becoming increasingly important to monitor](https://fathom.video/share/szEzDmsf8HPY8L3rnjgRRM5_UpDLXDPS?tab=summary&timestamp=1695.0)
  - [Quality content and brand mentions may be more critical for LLM visibility than traditional SEO metrics](https://fathom.video/share/szEzDmsf8HPY8L3rnjgRRM5_UpDLXDPS?tab=summary&timestamp=1743.0)

### Content Distribution and Visibility

  - [Posting quality content on Reddit to increase visibility, as LLMs are likely scraping from these sources](https://fathom.video/share/szEzDmsf8HPY8L3rnjgRRM5_UpDLXDPS?tab=summary&timestamp=1813.0)
  - [Discussion on the growing importance of Reddit for SEO and content distribution](https://fathom.video/share/szEzDmsf8HPY8L3rnjgRRM5_UpDLXDPS?tab=summary&timestamp=1828.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule a dedicated session in 2-3 weeks to discuss API directory design and structure](https://fathom.video/share/szEzDmsf8HPY8L3rnjgRRM5_UpDLXDPS?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)
  - [Implement Looker Studio for more comprehensive content performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/szEzDmsf8HPY8L3rnjgRRM5_UpDLXDPS?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)
  - [Continue spreading out content publication throughout the week to potentially improve indexing](https://fathom.video/share/szEzDmsf8HPY8L3rnjgRRM5_UpDLXDPS?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
  - [Explore ways to streamline the content uploading process, possibly involving VAs in the future](https://fathom.video/share/szEzDmsf8HPY8L3rnjgRRM5_UpDLXDPS?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
  - [Investigate and report on traffic from alternative search engines and LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/szEzDmsf8HPY8L3rnjgRRM5_UpDLXDPS?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
  - [Continue posting quality content on Reddit and other platforms to increase visibility for LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/szEzDmsf8HPY8L3rnjgRRM5_UpDLXDPS?tab=summary&timestamp=1813.0)
